title: The Crew Drifts Toward a Strange Island
description: On pages 5–7, Luffy, Zoro, and Nami reach a strange island where Gaimon and the rare animals guard a lonely mystery.
scene: The crew’s lighthearted exploration turns into a small fable about treasure, isolation, and the life Gaimon built after being trapped on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: let him sleep. He's still injured

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: towards the forest! You never know, there might be people there!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's no one here but poisonous snakes and wild animals!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But I think that it's a mutant snake

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That.. That's a pig, isn't it? A weird mutant pig

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Me? I am the forest guardian...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's right! If you still want to live, then leave at once!

summary: This part works as a pause between major arcs, showing that the sea contains strange lives and unusual dreams beyond simple battles.
